examples.text: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِيَ لَا أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَائِبِينَ
examples.english: ˹One day˺ he inspected the birds, and wondered, “Why is it that I cannot see the hoopoe? Or could he be absent?

etymology.text:
Onomatopoeic reduplicated. Compare Classical Syriac ܝܕܝܕܐ (yaḏyāḏā, “hoopoe”).

هُدْهُد
